node.title: Uber | Software Engineer L4 | Bengaluru | Aug 2022 [REJECTED]

topic.title: Uber | Software Engineer L4 | Bengaluru | Aug 2022 [REJECTED]

post.content:
Status: Software Developer with 4 years of experience in fintech & edutech industry.
Position: Software Engineer L4 at Uber
Location: Bengaluru, India 
Date: July, 2022

**4 Rounds:** 
1. **Technical - Coding (1 hour):**  
 - We are a currency exchange that maintains the current exchange rates between currencies. A user can come to us with some amount in one currency and request the equivalent amount in a different currency. Given a list of exchange rates between currencies, write a function that calculates currency rate between any 2 currencies.
	Example -
	(GBP, EUR, 10) - read as "1 GBP equals 10 EUR"
	(EUR, USD, 1.1) - "1 EUR equals 1.1 USD"
	(10 GBP, USD) => ? - "10 GBP equals how many USD?"

	Answer: 110
	Explanation: 10 GBP = 10 x (10 EUR) = 10 x (10 x (1.1 USD)) = 110 USD 
2. **Technical - LLD (1 hour):** 
 - Slight variation of [My Calendar I](https://leetcode.com/problems/my-calendar-i/) 
3. **Technical - HLD/Bar Raiser**
 - Asked about one of previous project in detail, design choices i made, what part of that project i own end-to-end. 
 - Design chat application with features like one-to-one messaging, group messaging, read receipts.
 - Asked API design & Database schema. 
4. **Hiring Manager (1 hour):** 
 - Not scheduled, Eliminated in Round 3 itself. 

**My BharatPe Interview Experience** - [REF](https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/2452211/Bharatpe-or-Tech-Lead-(SDE3)-or-Gurugram-or-May-2022-REJECTED)
**My GoMotive Interview Experience** - [REF](https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-question/2453469/GoMotive-or-Software-Engineer-L4-or-Bengaluru-or-June-2022-REJECTED)
**My Rupifi Interview Experience** - [REF](https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/2452464/Rupifi-or-SSE-or-Bengaluru-or-May-2022-ACCEPTED)
**My Yellow.ai Interview Experience** - [REF](https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/2455103/Yellow.ai-or-SDE3-or-Bengaluru-or-Aug-2022-OFFERED)
**My 1MG Interview Experience** - [REF](https://leetcode.com/discuss/interview-experience/2454153/1MG-or-SDE-3-or-Gurugram-or-July-2022-OFFERED)

Result: **REJECTED**.

**“No one has ever become poor from giving." - Anne Frank**
What went wrong for you, if any,  according to u in the first 2 rounds ?
Why you got rejected ? What went wrong in round 3 ?
Thanks OP for sharing your interview experience
Ques 1 is Graph BFS Problem, (variation of Dijkstra)
sir can u share ur preparation tips for DSA.. and LLD && HLD
